stages.concept:
# Unit 144: 분사구문 (조건, 양보) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 분사구문의 **조건**과 **양보** 의미에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **조건 (= if)** — ~하면

> **Turning** left, you will find the bank.
> 왼쪽으로 돌면, 은행을 발견할 것이다.
> = **If** you **turn** left, ...

> **Studying** hard, you will pass the exam.
> 열심히 공부하면, 시험에 합격할 것이다.
> = **If** you **study** hard, ...

👩‍🏫 선생님: **양보 (= though, although)** — ~이지만, 비록 ~일지라도

> **Admitting** his fault, he didn't apologize.
> 자신의 잘못을 인정하면서도, 그는 사과하지 않았다.
> = **Though** he **admitted** his fault, ...

> **Being** poor, she is happy.
> 가난하지만, 그녀는 행복하다.
> = **Although** she **is** poor, ...

👩‍🏫 선생님: 양보 분사구문에서는 접속사를 남기기도 해요.

> **Though being** poor, she is happy.
> **While walking** in the park, I saw a rainbow.

**Q. 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 분사구문을 부사절로 바르게 고친 것을 고르세요.**
"<u>Taking this bus</u>, you will get there in time." (이 버스를 타면, 제시간에 도착할 것이다.)
1. If you take this bus ✅
2. Because you take this bus
3. Though you take this bus

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! '버스를 탄다면(조건)'의 문맥이므로 접속사 if를 살려 절을 만들어야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 분사구문은 때, 이유, 조건, 양보 모두 가능! 문맥으로 판단하고, 이해를 돕기 위해 접속사를 남길 수도 있군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 144: 분사구문 조건, 양보 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 분사구문에서 생략된 접속사를 고르시오.
Opening the door, you will find something surprising. (     )
> **정답** If

---

**02.** Living in Seoul, she misses her hometown. ?
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**03.** Turning left, you will see the library. ?
> **정답** If

---

**04.** Being young, he is very wise. ?
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**05.** Taking a taxi, you can arrive in 10 minutes. ?
> **정답** If

---

**06.** 접속사절을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
If you turn right, you will see the park.
> **정답** Turning right, you will see the park.

---

**07.** Although he was tired, he kept studying.
> **정답** Being tired, he kept studying.

---

**08.** If you follow this road, you will find the store.
> **정답** Following this road, you will find the store.

---

**09.** Although she is young, she can cook well.
> **정답** Being young, she can cook well.

---

**10.** If you practice hard, you will improve.
> **정답** Practicing hard, you will improve.

---

**11.** 분사구문을 접속사절로 바꾸시오. (조건)
Taking the subway, you can get there faster.
> **정답** If you take the subway, you can get there faster.

---

**12.** Walking straight, you will see the school.
> **정답** If you walk straight, you will see the school.

---

**13.** 분사구문을 접속사절로 바꾸시오. (양보)
Being rich, he lives simply.
> **정답** Although he is rich, he lives simply.

---

**14.** Living alone, she doesn't feel lonely.
> **정답** Although she lives alone, she doesn't feel lonely.

---

**15.** Being busy, he always helps others.
> **정답** Although he is busy, he always helps others.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
오른쪽으로 돌면 학교가 보일 것이다. (조건)
Turning you right will see the school
> **정답** Turning / right / you / will / see / the / school

---

**17.** 어리지만 그녀는 요리를 잘한다. (양보)
Being she young can cook well
> **정답** Being / young / she / can / cook / well

---

**18.** 택시를 타면 10분이면 도착할 수 있다. (조건)
Taking a taxi can you arrive in 10 minutes
> **정답** Taking / a / taxi / you / can / arrive / in / 10 / minutes

---

**19.** 바쁘지만 그는 항상 남을 돕는다. (양보)
Being he busy always helps others
> **정답** Being / busy / he / always / helps / others

---

**20.** 직진하면 공원이 보일 것이다. (조건)
Walking you straight will see the park
> **정답** Walking / straight / you / will / see / the / park
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 144: 분사구문 조건, 양보 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
오른쪽으로 돌면 그 건물이 보일 것이다.
_______ to the right, you'll see the building.
Having turned
Turning
Turn
If you turn
> **정답** If you turn, Turning

---

**02.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
비록 그는 어리지만 현명하다.
_______ young, he is wise.
Being
Although he is
If he is
Been
> **정답** Although he is, Being

---

**03.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
Taking the medicine, I didn't get better.
Eating too much, I gained weight.
Looking to the left, you will see the cafe.
Taking a rest, you will feel better.
Studying hard, he failed the test.
> **정답** Studying hard, he failed the test.

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
Going straight, you will find a supermarket.
Using this method, you can solve this
problem.
Going into my room, I fell asleep.
Being tall, he couldn't reach the shelf.
Being afraid of dogs, he didn't run away.
> **정답** Using this method, you can solve this problem.

---

**05.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Searching for the clues, they didn't find them.
Though they searched for the clues
While they searched for the clues
Because they searched for the clues
If they searched for the clues
> **정답** Though they searched for the clues

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Working together, you will do better.
Until you work together
Although you work together
Even if you work together
If you work together
> **정답** If you work together

---

**07.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Falling down, he did not cry.
He fell down
Since he falls down
Because he fell down
Although he fell down
> **정답** Although he fell down

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Drawing a picture well, he isn't a painter.
__________ he draws a picture well, he isn't a painter.
If
Since
While
Though
> **정답** Though

---

**09.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Having enough money, Minsu will buy the watch.
_______ Minsu has enough money, he will buy the
watch.
And
If
Even though
Though
> **정답** If

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although he didn't know how to swim, he went to the
swimming pool with his friend.
Knowing not how to swim
Not knowing how to swim
Although he knew how to swim
Knowing how to swim
> **정답** Not knowing how to swim

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
If you open the box, you will find the toy.
You opening the box
Open the box
Opening the box
You open the box
> **정답** Opening the box

---

**12.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Taking a taxi, you won't be late for the meeting.
_______ you take a taxi, you won't be late for the
meeting.
While
Until
Though
If
> **정답** If

---

**13.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Having a lot of friends, I feel lonely.
_______ I have a lot of friends, I feel lonely.
Though
After
Because
If
> **정답** Though

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지 셋과 다른 하나를
고르시오.
Hurting his leg, he exercised.
Being in a hurry, they didn't arrive on time.
Liking novels, she will definitely read this
book.
Being night, it was not dark.
> **정답** Liking novels, she will definitely read this book.

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지 셋과 다른 하나를
고르시오.
Preparing for the test well, you will be able to
pass the test this time.
Taking a subway, you will arrive at the
meeting on time.
Having the book, he didn't read it.
Being interested in the club, you can join it.
> **정답** Having the book, he didn't read it.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
그녀가 일찍 일어난다면 제시간에 도착할 것이다.
__________, she will arrive on time.
If she gets up early
Having got up early
Getting up early
Though she gets up early
> **정답** If she gets up early, Getting up early

---

**17.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Meeting her many times, he didn't know her name.
_______ he met her many times, he didn't know her
name.
Because
Though
If
Since
> **정답** Though

---

**18.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Meeting him again, I will give him flowers.
_______ I meet him again, I will give him flowers.
Unless
Before
Though
If
> **정답** If

---

**19.** 다음 글에서 어법상 어색한 것을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
He wants to be a movie director.
Although he had never studied movies, he
filmed a video by himself. The video won an award
at the competition. Practice harder, he
will be a great film director.
> **정답** to be, Although, Practicing, will be

---

**20.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중
어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Not eating lunch, he wasn't hungry.
→ Although he doesn't eat lunch,
he wasn't hungry.
> **정답** Although, didn't (did not), eat, wasn't
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 144 분사구문 조건, 양보중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
Although he took a taxi, he was late for the
meeting .
, he was late for the meeting.
정답 Taking a taxi

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
If they are thirsty, they can drink this water.
, they can drink this water.
정답 Being thirsty

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
Although she did not learn how to write, Somin
published a novel.
, Somin published
a novel.
정답 Not learning how to write (Never learning how to write)
write)

---

**04.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 분사구문과 괄호 안의 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀가 학교에 일찍 도착한다면 선생님과 상담을 할 것이
다.
힌트 (     ) arrive at
  (     )   (     )  early, she will consult with her
teacher.
정답 Arriving, at, school

---

**05.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 분사구문과 괄호 안의 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
비록 그들은 개를 키우고 싶었지만 형편이 되지 않았다.
힌트 (     ) although, want, have a dog
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , they
couldn't afford it.
정답 Although, wanting, to, have, a, dog

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 분사구문과 괄호 안의 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
열이 나면, 이 약을 복용하세요.
힌트 (     ) have a fever
  (     )   (     ) , take this medicine.
정답 Having, a, fever

---

**07.** 문맥에 맞게 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 분사구문을
부사절로 고치시오.
[if, although]
Not having much money, he helped the poor.
→  (     ) , he helped
the poor.
정답 Although he didn't have much money

---

**08.** 문맥에 맞게 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 분사구문을
부사절로 고치시오.
[if, although]
Traveling to Iceland, she will be able to see the
aurora.
→  (     ) , she will be
able to see the aurora.
정답 If she travels to Iceland

---

**09.** 문맥에 맞게 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 분사구문을
부사절로 고치시오.
[if, although]
Doing our best, we lost the game.
→  (     ) , we lost the
game.
정답 Although we did our best

---

**10.** 문맥에 맞게 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 분사구문을
부사절로 고치시오.
[if, although]
Having time, I will go to see the concert every
month.
→  (     ) , I will go to
see the concert every month.
정답 If I have time

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 144: 분사구문 조건, 양보 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
왼쪽으로 돌면 그 가게가 보일 것이다. _______ to the left, you'll see the shop.
Having turned Turning Turn If you turn
> 정답: If you turn, Turning

---

**02.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
비록 그녀는 어리지만 용감하다. _______ young, she is brave.
Being Although she is If she is Been
> 정답: Although he is, Being

---

**03.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
Taking the medicine, she didn't get better.
Eating too much, she gained weight.
Looking to the right, you will see the bakery.
Taking a break, you will feel better.
Practicing hard, he failed the match.
> 정답: Practicing hard, he failed the match.

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
Going straight, you will find a bookstore.
Using this app, you can track your progress.
Going into her room, she fell asleep.
Being tall, she couldn't reach the top shelf.
Being afraid of spiders, he didn't run away.
> 정답: Using this app, you can track your progress.

---

**05.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Looking for the keys, they didn't find them.
Though they looked for the keys While they looked for the keys Because they looked for the keys If they looked
for the keys
> 정답: Though they searched for the clues

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Studying together, you will learn faster.
Until you study together Although you study together Even if you study together If you study together
> 정답: If you work together

---

**07.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Tripping over the rock, she did not cry.
She tripped over the rock Since she trips over the rock Because she tripped over the rock Although she tripped
over the rock
> 정답: Although he fell down

---

**08.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Singing a song well, she isn't a professional singer. __________ she sings a song well, she isn't a professional singer.
If Since While Though
> 정답: Though

---

**09.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Having enough time, Amy will visit the museum. _______ Amy has enough time, she will visit the museum.
And If Even though Though
> 정답: If

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although he didn't know how to cook, he made dinner for his family.
Knowing not how to cook Not knowing how to cook Although he knew how to cook Knowing how to cook
> 정답: Not knowing how to swim

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
If you open the envelope, you will find a letter.
You opening the envelope Open the envelope Opening the envelope You open the envelope
> 정답: Opening the envelope

---

**12.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Taking the subway, you won't be late for the concert. _______ you take the subway, you won't be late for the concert.
While Until Though If
> 정답: If

---

**13.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Having many hobbies, I feel bored sometimes. _______ I have many hobbies, I feel bored sometimes.
Though After Because If
> 정답: Though

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지 셋과 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Hurting her arm, she kept playing.
Being in a hurry, they didn't arrive on time.
Enjoying puzzles, he will definitely try this one.
Being cloudy, it was not cold.
> 정답: Enjoying puzzles, he will definitely try this one.

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지 셋과 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Preparing for the speech well, you will be able to impress the audience.
Taking a taxi, you will arrive at the airport on time.
Having the ticket, she didn't use it.
Being interested in the workshop, you can join it.
> 정답: Having the ticket, she didn't use it.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그가 일찍 출발한다면 첫 번째 버스를 탈 수 있을 것이다. __________, he will catch the first bus.
If he leaves early Having left early Leaving early Though he leaves early
> 정답: If she gets up early, Getting up early

---

**17.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Visiting her many times, he didn't know her address. _______ he visited her many times, he didn't know her address.
Because Though If Since
> 정답: Though

**18.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Seeing him again, I will give him a souvenir. _______ I see him again, I will give him a souvenir.
Unless Before Though If
> 정답: If

**19.** 다음 글에서 어법상 어색한 것을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
She wants to be a chef.
Although she had never studied cooking, she prepared a meal by herself.
The meal won praise from everyone.
Practice more, she will be a great chef.
> 정답: to be, Although, Practicing, will be

**20.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Not eating breakfast, she wasn't hungry. → Although she doesn't eat breakfast, she wasn't hungry.
> 정답: Although, didn't (did not), eat, wasn't
